ListItem.Para: APU battery charger is deactivated.
APU battery voltage is verified to be sufficient for APU start before each departure.
APU operates normally.
One ASG starter operates normally.
Left ASG generator operates normally.
Right ASG generator operates normally.

Note.Para: ELEC APU STARTER R status message may be displayed.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify APU battery voltage is sufficient for an APU start and deactivate the APU battery charger (AMM DDG 24-31-03).

ListItem.Para: Open and collar the P400 panel circuit breaker APU BAT CHGR INPUT.
Before each departure:
Confirm P49 panel circuit breaker APU BAT CHGR OUTPUT is closed.
Verify APU battery voltage is 31 DC-V or greater on the ELECTRICAL maintenance page 1.
Open and collar P49 panel circuit breaker APU BAT CHGR OUTPUT.
APU battery charger is deactivated.
APU is not used.
Left AGCU operates normally.
VFSG systems operate normally.
EDTO beyond 180 minutes is not conducted.

Note.Para: A VFSG system is considered to be operating normally if its associated status message (ELEC GEN SYS L1, L2, R1 or R2) is not displayed.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the APU battery charger (AMM DDG 24-31-03).

ListItem.Para: Open and collar the P400 panel circuit breaker APU BAT CHGR INPUT.
Open and collar the P49 panel circuit breaker APU BAT CHGR OUTPUT.
EDTO beyond 180 minutes is not conducted.
Start the first engine using the Ground Power Engine Start Supplementary Procedure.
